stitched_capital_account_max_drawdown.reason: Monthly 126-session forward windows overlap and no single daily capital-allocation ledger was frozen. Compounding them would double-count capital.

implementability_assessment.decision_reason: The selected cohort is one stock and one sector in every period, has no bottom bucket, underperforms SPY before costs, and underperforms the same cohort's equal-weight basket.

outcome_reproduction.method: Recalculate the first 126 aligned trading-session intervals after each prediction from adjusted closes in the authoritative warehouse.

liquidity.limitation: Dollar volume does not measure bid-ask spreads, order size, market impact, borrow, or executable capacity.
liquidity.method: Median of unadjusted close times reported volume over the 20 valid sessions ending on the prediction date; no future volume is used.

methodology.benchmark: SPY forward return on the same aligned 126-session dates.
methodology.eligible_equal_weight_comparator: Equal weight across every eligible security in the same month.
methodology.return_interpretation: Arithmetic mean of overlapping 126-session cohort outcomes; not an annualized or compounded capital-account return.
methodology.selection: Equal-weight quintile 5 after the frozen tie-aware monthly ranking.
methodology.transaction_costs: One-way cost in bps times monthly selection turnover. No spread or market-impact estimate is added.

benchmark_match.reason: The eligible cohort is entirely Financials-labelled while SPY is broad-market. A sector-neutral benchmark was not frozen.

root_cause_assessment.conclusion: Negative net excess is already present before costs. Costs add only a small drag; extreme cohort and benchmark concentration prevent a clean weak-signal versus benchmark-mismatch attribution.

weak_signal.reason: Only nine tiny months have calculable Rank IC, while the selected basket is negative and less effective than eligible equal weight.

top_minus_bottom.reason: No monthly cohort contains five eligible securities, so quintile 1 is never populated.

warehouse.reason: Large derived warehouse is bound by deterministic outcome, portfolio, and liquidity fingerprints.
